metadata.description: Claude Code plugins for Graphite stacked PRs workflow

plugins.name: graphite
plugins.description: Skill, hooks and agents for Graphite CLI stacked PRs: gt commands, stack planning, conflict resolution, multi-agent worktree orchestration

plugins.name: graphite-mcp
plugins.description: MCP server integration for Graphite CLI (gt mcp)

plugins.name: graphite-openspec
plugins.description: OpenSpec binding for graphite worker orchestration: /gt-apply applies an OpenSpec change on its own stacked branch via a single gt-stack-worker. Enable only in repos that use OpenSpec; requires the graphite plugin.
